UI.TITLE: Darkis GodForge
UI.SUBTITLE: Create, publish, and connect them directly to characters.
UI.NO_WONDERS: This deity grants no activatable wonders.
UI.NO_ASSIGNED_DEITY_HINT: Choose a deity in the Divine Codex or ask the GM to assign one to this character.
UI.CHOOSE_GRANTS_HINT: Select the required options for this deity.
UI.ASSIGNMENT_FAILED: The deity could not be assigned.
UI.SELECTION_REQUIRES_GM: This deity requires grant choices first.
UI.OPEN_CODEX: Open Divine Codex – available without a selected token
UI.OPEN_HUB: Open Follower Hub – the character's deity, bonuses, and wonders
UI.SELECT_CHARACTER_FIRST: The Follower Hub shows a character's deity, bonuses, and wonders. Control a token or choose one of your characters.
UI.NEW_DEITY_HINT: Define identity, rules, wonders, and visibility.
UI.NAME: Name
UI.OPEN_DASHBOARD: Open GM dashboard – create and manage deities
UI.WIZARD_INTRO: The wizard guides you step by step through creating a game-ready deity.
UI.STEP_BASIC_INTRO: Give your deity a clear identity. Everything except the name can be added later.
UI.HELP_NAME: The unique name used for this deity in the codex.
UI.HELP_TITLE: A short epithet such as “The Faith” or “Lady of Stars”.
UI.HELP_DESCRIPTION: Summarize the deity's nature, faith, and presence for players.
UI.HELP_QUOTE: A characteristic saying or guiding phrase.
UI.HELP_TAGS: Internal search terms, separated by commas.
UI.STEP_APPEARANCE_INTRO: Choose how the deity appears on cards, in the codex, and in selection dialogs.
UI.OPTIONAL_STEP_HINT: All images are optional. Paste Foundry paths, browse for files, or drag files onto the fields.
UI.HELP_PORTRAIT: Large image for detail views and the Divine Codex.
UI.HELP_ICON: Small, readable image for lists and buttons.
UI.HELP_SYMBOL: The cult's sign, seal, or holy symbol.
UI.HELP_BANNER: Wide background image for presentation areas.
UI.STEP_SYSTEM_INTRO: Enter the rules Pathfinder 2e or Starfinder 2e needs for this deity.
UI.HELP_WEAPON: The favored weapon of the deity's followers.
UI.HELP_SKILL: The skill granted by the deity, such as religion.
UI.HELP_FONT: Divine font such as heal, harm, or both.
UI.HELP_SANCTIFICATION: Allowed sanctification, such as holy or unholy.
UI.HELP_CAUSE: Optional champion cause or comparable bond.
UI.HELP_EDICTS: Actions followers are expected to uphold.
UI.HELP_SPELLS: Optional granted spells; one rank and UUID per line.
UI.ADVANCED_SYSTEM_VALUES: Additional system values for advanced users
UI.HELP_ALIGNMENT: Legacy alignment for older system data.
UI.HELP_ALTERNATE_DOMAINS: Additional domains outside the primary selection.
UI.STEP_BONUSES_INTRO: Add persistent mechanical benefits. Empty cards are ignored when saving.
UI.STEP_WONDERS_INTRO: Create activatable abilities with uses, reset events, and effects.
UI.STEP_REPLACEMENT_INTRO: Choose an official deity as a template or replace it in GodForge selections without changing the system compendium.
UI.HELP_REPLACEMENT_MODE: None uses the selection only as a template; hide or replace changes GodForge catalogs.
UI.HELP_OFFICIAL_DEITY: Choose a name from the active system compendium instead of entering a UUID.
UI.HELP_REPLACEMENT_CONTEXTS: Limits replacement to specific catalogs. Empty means all contexts.
UI.STEP_VISIBILITY_INTRO: Control exactly what players see before and after choosing the deity.
UI.HELP_DEITY_VISIBILITY: Controls who can see the deity at all.
UI.HELP_FIELD_VISIBILITY: Controls visibility for this individual content field.
UI.HELP_GM_NOTES: These notes remain visible only to the GM.
UI.STEP_PREVIEW_INTRO: Review the key details and choose the publication status.
UI.HELP_STATUS: Drafts remain with the GM; published makes the deity normally selectable.
UI.HELP_BONUS_NAME: A clear name for the benefit.
UI.HELP_SELECTOR: The system value affected by the bonus, such as religion.
UI.HELP_WONDER_NAME: The visible name of the ability.
UI.HELP_WONDER_DESCRIPTION: Describe exactly what happens on activation.
UI.HELP_USAGES: How often the wonder can be used before its next reset.
UI.HELP_RESET: The event that restores spent uses.
UI.BONUS_EDITOR_HINT: Create multiple system-native bonuses with conditions and individual visibility.
UI.ABILITY_EDITOR_HINT: Configure activation, uses, reset, and effect.
UI.GRANT_GROUPS_HINT: Nest AND/OR groups and override inherited names, descriptions, or values.
UI.STACKING_WARNING: In PF2e, this status bonus does not stack with another status bonus on the same selector; only the highest value applies.
UI.VISIBILITY_HINT: Hidden fields are never sent to players.
UI.RANDOM_MANAGER_HINT: The result is fixed before the wheel starts spinning.
UI.TEST_LAB_HINT: Test existing tables and fortune wheels without creating new content.
UI.NO_RANDOM_TABLES: No random tables have been created yet.
UI.NO_FORTUNE_WHEELS: No fortune wheels have been created yet.
UI.NO_OFFICIAL_DEITIES_HINT: The active system adapter did not detect a matching deity pack.
UI.CHARACTER_MANAGER_HINT: Assign a deity and its grants to a character.
UI.IMPORT_EXPORT_HINT: Back up or transfer your GodForge data.
UI.DATA_MANAGER_HINT: Inspect GodForge packages before import and export a portable backup of your definitions.
UI.EXPORT_HINT: Exports all deities including visibility, bonuses, wonders, grants, and replacements.
UI.IMPORT_HINT: The file is validated and summarized before any changes are made.
UI.IMPORT_APPLY_HINT: Existing IDs are updated and new IDs are added.
UI.MIGRATION_MANAGER_HINT: GodForge updates older definitions automatically when they are loaded.
UI.MIGRATION_RELOAD_HINT: Reload the world to update pending definitions.
UI.MIGRATION_COMPLETE: All deities use the current schema.
UI.PLANNED: Planned for a later alpha release
UI.MANUAL_RESET_HINT: If the system event did not fire, the GM can reset daily uses here manually.
UI.EMPTY_HINT: Create a new deity or import a pantheon.
UI.LARGER_WINDOW: A larger window is recommended for the full editor.

SETTINGS.MENU_HINT: Opens the dashboard for creating and managing custom deities.

ERROR.GM_ONLY: Only the GM may use this GodForge feature.
ERROR.NO_PERMISSION: You are not allowed to use this GodForge feature.
ERROR.DASHBOARD_OPEN: The dashboard did not open. Details are available in the browser console.
ERROR.CODEX_OPEN: The Divine Codex did not open. Reload Foundry and try again.
ERROR.HUB_OPEN: The character hub could not be loaded. Check that the character is still available.
ERROR.UNSUPPORTED_SYSTEM: Darkis GodForge does not support the active {system} system.
